description: An analyst wants to view the risk scores for all patients with asthma, broken down by risk level (low, medium, high).

expected_outcome.value: The system displays a list of all patients with an asthma diagnosis.

nodes.task_description: Group the patient list by their calculated risk score category.

expected_outcome.value: The system displays the patients in groups of low, medium, and high risk.

nodes.task_description: Drill down into the 'high-risk' group to see the individual patients who may need intervention.

expected_outcome.value: The analyst can view the specific patients who are most at risk, allowing for targeted outreach.
